text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
6 
BRND_GNRC_CD 
LABEL: 
Brand-Generic Code Reported by Submitting Plan 
DESCRIPTION: Plan reported value indicating whether the plan adjudicated the claim as a brand or generic drug. 
Applies to covered drugs only. 
SHORT NAME: BRNDGNCD 
LONG NAME: BRND_GNRC_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
B = Brand 
G = Generic 
Null/missing 
COMMENT:
